#  Search Contextually within Specifications (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:** 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Specifications tool.
  * This item can be viewed or edited offline if it was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Specifications** tool from your Android device.
  2. Search for or tap on the specification section within which you want to search. See [Search for Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-android/tutorials/search-for-specifications-android).
  3. Tap **Search** ![Icon Search Android](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7a1567256d48c74dc58bb9c7434e387f/a8d92f24d7f05df73dfd626cc536b400/icon-search-android.png?fm=webp&h=18).  
![Specifications Android Search Specifications Contextually](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/50d30a3d163f25adb21b839fbbb3fa59/abbc4d3623d8d1fdb6bb2d6a9e0ccfee/specifications-android-search-specifications-contextually.png?fm=webp)
  4. Type the key word or phrase you want to locate within the specification section.  
_Note:_ The word or phrase you entered with be highlighted.
  5. Tap a result beneath the search bar to navigate directly to the keyword or phrase within the specification section.


## See Also
  * [View Specifications (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-android/tutorials/view-specifications-android)
  * [Search for Specifications (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-android/tutorials/search-for-specifications-android)
  * [Specifications (Android) - Overview](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-android)
title: Search Contextually within Specifications (Android)
description: How to search within a specification section in the Specifications tool to find a keyword or phrase from your Android mobile device.
